html:
The Hammer is a Tool that can be used to demolish Structures. It requires 3 Rocks, 3 Twigs, and 6 Cut Grass to craft and does not need to be prototyped. Hammers can break down any player-made Structures and most naturally occurring Structures such as Pig Houses, yielding at least 50% of the materials used to create the Structure in most cases.

If the player strikes a container such as a Chest or Crock Pot, all items within will fly out but remain undamaged. It also can be used on an Ancient Pseudoscience Station and Ornate Chest, both of which are found in the Ruins, to make random effects and objects appear.

Bones can be hammered for Bone Shards, and hammering a Merm Head or Pig Head during a Full Moon will yield Nightmare Fuel, as well as their usual items. The Hammer can also be used to "whack" Moleworms, which will stun them.

Usage

The Hammer can be used to break down structures by equipping it then right-clicking a structure. After the first right click, left mouse button or space bar can be held down to continue hammering until the structure breaks.

The Hammer can be used as a weapon, dealing 17 damage per strike. It has 75 uses, meaning each use will reduce 1.33% of its durability, whether it was used as a weapon or to deconstruct objects.

Using the Hammer on a Structure that has "uses" (e.g. the Tent) may return less than 50% of the materials used to craft it, based on how many times the Structure has been used. For structures that have usage, the amount returned for each type of ingredient is: amount_returned = original_amount * percent_uses_left * 0.5 Hammering a structure will always yield at least one of each of the crafting materials, with the exception of Walls, which drop their main component instead. If the main component of the Wall is a Refined item, its base components are dropped instead. For example, a Sign which requires 1 Boards to craft will drop 1 Boards when hammered, a Hay Wall crafted from Cut Grass and Twigs will only drop Cut Grass, and a Wood Wall crafted from Boards and Rope will only drop Logs. Light Tab Structures will drop Ashes in addition to their components.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Forging Hammer skin was introduced during the official The Forge event in 2018.
  • The Woven - Elegant Prybar Hammer skin was introduced during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019.
  • The Woven - Elegant Hammush skin was introduced in the An Eye for An Eye update in 2021, as a crossover collaboration with Re-Logic's Terraria. Its rarity was Inspired - Elegant initially, but received change in August 19, 2022.
Woven - Classy
Pantomimed Collection
Pantomimed Hammer
Convey an incredibly convincing impression of a hammer.
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Forging Hammer
Watch out for the spikey bits.
See ingame

A mighty man hammers with a crowbar
See ingame
Loyal
The Tenderizer
Pound them to a pulp!

Trivia

  • A wooden Hammer is the icon used for the Structures Tab.
  • Sometimes when hammering certain Structures, the resources will be shot out of the structure instead of being dropped normally.

Assets

HammerThe Tenderizer

  • Dropped

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • Wolfgang figurine holding a Hammer.
  • Wolfgang standing next to a Pig Torch with a Hammer prompt.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Wilson holding a Hammer.

"hammer"
“Stop! It's time! To hammer things!”
–Wilson
“I prefer sharp implements.”
–Willow
“Needs sickle!”
–Wolfgang
“This hammer does not create... it only destroys...”
–Wendy
“DECONSTRUCTION”
–WX-78
“A worker's tool.”
–Wickerbottom
“Everyone makes mistakes, eh?”
–Woodie
“It feels good to undo the work of others.”
–Maxwell
“For use on inanimate objects. Akin to a dissection scalpel.”
–Wagstaff
“Möre fit för labör than battle.”
–Wigfrid
“Chaos and destruction!”
–Webber
“Smashing stuff *sounds* like work, but it's pretty fun.”
–Walani
“For tenderizing boeuf!”
–Warly
“Ye could put quite a 'ole in a boat wit' tis.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA CAN'ST SMASH NOW!”
–Wilba
“Smasher”
–Wormwood
“Everyone needs a tool to smash things with.”
–Wheeler
“And I know how to use it!”
–Winona
“To drive my points home.”
–Wortox
“Break everything!”
–Wurt
“Sometimes you need to break stuff to make stuff.”
–Walter
“Sometimes things need undoing.”
–Wanda
The Hammer is a Tool that can be used to demolish Structures. It requires 3 Rocks, 3 Twigs, and 6 Cut Grass to craft and does not need to be prototyped. amount_returned = original_amount * percent_uses_left * 0.5

If the main component of the Wall is a Refined item, its base components are dropped instead. summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Búa là một Công cụ có thể được sử dụng để phá hủy các Công trình. Nó cần 3 Đá, 3 Cành Cây và 6 Cỏ Cắt để chế tạo và không cần phải tạo nguyên mẫu. Búa có thể phá vỡ mọi Công trình do người chơi tạo ra và hầu hết các Công trình xuất hiện tự nhiên như Nhà Lợn, mang lại ít nhất 50% vật liệu dùng để tạo Công trình trong hầu hết các trường hợp.

If the main component of the Wall is a [[Refine]]d item, its base components are dropped instead.
